# Elleven Media

> Elleven Media is a premium digital media studio offering web design, SEO & performance optimization, managed hosting & infrastructure, email & domain setup, and DevOps & deployment support. We serve individuals and growing businesses, with a focus on custom SvelteKit builds, Cloudflare-native infrastructure, and Shopify Hydrogen storefronts.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://ellevenmediagroup.com/
- Portfolio: https://ellevenmediagroup.com/portfolio
- Contact: https://ellevenmediagroup.com/contact

## Services

- Web Design & Development: Custom websites built on SvelteKit and modern frameworks
- SEO & Performance: Core Web Vitals optimization, technical SEO, on-page strategy
- Hosting & Infrastructure: Cloudflare Workers, edge deployment, CDN configuration
- Email & Domain Setup: Professional email, DNS configuration, deliverability
- DevOps & Deployment: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, deployment automation

## Contact

Email: hello@ellevenmediagroup.com
Location: California, United States
